text:
There once was a girl named Lily. Every morning Lily would put on her pink robe and go on a little adventure around the town.

Her favourite activity was wandering the old library, where the walls whispered ancient secrets about the world long gone. Sometimes Lily would sit by the tall shelves, and read about people from different centuries.

One day, as Lily wandered through the library, she came across a book of potion recipes that included ingredients she had never seen before. Her imagination took flight. She could brew every potion imaginable... for example, the Grandeur Potion. She imagined it would make her grow tall like a wizard. She spent hours trying to make one.

Eventually Lily forgot about her obsession and went back to her daydreams.

That summer, Lily learned an important thing: a good adventure is one you embark on while enjoying the journey.

Every day after school, she would explore fields nearby, searching for magical creatures. She liked collecting shiny stones and tiny insects. She loved nights filled with star
